query: ( "heat warning"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat alert"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat alert system"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat-health action plan"[Title/Abstract] OR "weather forecast intervention"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat watch"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat advisory"[Title/Abstract] OR "extreme heat warning"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat emergency"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat wave warning"[Title/Abstract] ) AND ( "temperature-mortality"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat-related mortality"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat-related death"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat-related deaths"[Title/Abstract] OR "excess mortality"[Title/Abstract] OR "excess deaths"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat-related illness"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat morbidity"[Title/Abstract] OR "hyperthermia"[Title/Abstract] OR "thermal stress"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat-related hospitalization"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat-related hospitalisation"[Title/Abstract] OR "Heat Stress Disorders"[MeSH Terms] OR "Cause of Death"[MeSH Terms] ) AND ( "quasi-experimental"[Title/Abstract] OR "difference-in-differences"[Title/Abstract] OR "difference in differences"[Title/Abstract] OR "regression discontinuity"[Title/Abstract] OR "interrupted time series"[Title/Abstract] OR "controlled interrupted time series"[Title/Abstract] OR "natural experiment"[Title/Abstract] OR "instrumental variable"[Title/Abstract] OR "propensity score"[Title/Abstract] OR "matching estimator"[Title/Abstract] OR "synthetic control"[Title/Abstract] OR "event study design"[Title/Abstract] OR "stepped wedge"[Title/Abstract] OR "before-after study"[Title/Abstract] OR "causal inference"[Title/Abstract] OR "counterfactual"[Title/Abstract] OR "exogenous variation"[Title/Abstract] OR "identification strategy"[Title/Abstract] OR "randomized controlled trial"[Title/Abstract] OR "randomised controlled trial"[Title/Abstract] OR "Randomized Controlled Trial"[Publication Type] )
